notes: JonOps schedule template. active:false = skill exists but cron disabled. Set timezone in CLAUDE.md. Update times as needed.

00:00.description: Write and publish one SEO blog post from Content Calendar queue

07:00.description: Write and publish today's daily contribution (tips, facts, or themed content)

09:00.description: Create platform-specific social posts from most recent blog post

11:00.description: Morning email check — categorize, draft replies per email persona

12:00.description: Discover Reddit posts with engagement opportunities, draft data-enriched responses

16:00.description: Monitor posted conversations, update metrics, draft follow-ups, flag items for posting

20:00.description: Create social posts from Social Queue (researcher topics)

22:00.description: Check Asana Agent To Do section for ad hoc tasks from operator

14:00.description: Run one query from Link Outreach Queries — scrape blogs/sites, verify emails, push to Airtable

18:00.description: Push up to 5 verified backlink leads to Instantly, check replies, log positives to Asana

23:30.description: Review today's cron results, retry any failures, report to Asana

monday_08:00.description: Research and queue 10 new SEO keywords via DataForSEO

monday_09:30.description: Research content angles for queued keywords, populate Content Calendar

monday_02:30.description: Weekly market scan — trends, SERP players, content gaps, keyword opportunities. Feeds keyword-researcher, content-researcher, social-researcher, link-outreach-query-researcher.

monday_04:00.description: Weekly GSC + GA4 sweep — meta-title quick wins, content-refresh candidates, brand-defense gaps, traffic-source patterns. May auto-apply Rank Math meta rewrites at confidence >= 0.85.

monday_10:30.description: Mine competitor backlinks, generate and score search queries for blog/PR outreach

monday_14:00.description: Research and queue B2B target search queries per CLAUDE.md target profile

monday_16:00.description: Find B2B bulk buyer leads via Google Maps or LinkedIn per CLAUDE.md target profile (drain fresh queue 2h after Mon query-researcher)

tuesday_10:00.description: Find B2B bulk buyer leads via Google Maps or LinkedIn per CLAUDE.md target profile

thursday_15:00.description: Find B2B bulk buyer leads via Google Maps or LinkedIn per CLAUDE.md target profile

friday_12:00.description: Find B2B bulk buyer leads via Google Maps or LinkedIn per CLAUDE.md target profile

wednesday_10:00.description: Push verified B2B leads to Instantly B2B campaign, manage replies

thursday_08:00.description: Research 2 social post topics, write briefs, push to Social Queue

thursday_10:00.description: Research newsletter topic, write brief with subject line options

friday_08:00.description: Write and send weekly newsletter from Newsletter Queue

saturday_08:00.description: Research 2 social post topics for next week queue

sunday_08:00.description: Sync new Fluent CRM contacts to Sendy newsletter list
